query:
SELECT 
  tep.entryId,
  tep.performerId,
  p.name as performer_name,
  COUNT(spa.id) as total_actions,
  SUM(a.points) as total_points
FROM tournamentEntryPerformers tep
JOIN performers p ON tep.performerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN scenePerformerActions spa ON spa.performerId = tep.performerId
LEFT JOIN actions a ON spa.actionId = a.id
GROUP BY tep.entryId, tep.performerId
LIMIT 20;
